fields.description: Select how search engines should index and follow links on this page.
fields.name: robots

fields.description: The meta title is displayed in search engine results as the clickable headline for a given result. It should be concise and accurately reflect the content of the page.
fields.name: title
fields.title: Meta Title

fields.description: Provide a concise summary of the page content. This description may be used by search engines in search results.
fields.name: description
fields.title: Meta Description

fields.description: Upload an image that represents the content of the page. This image may be used in social media previews and search engine results.
fields.name: metaImage

fields.description: Add custom meta attributes to the head of the document for additional SEO and social media integration.
fields.name: metaAttributes
fields.title: Additional Meta Attributes

fields.description: Add relevant keywords for this page. These keywords will be used for SEO purposes.
fields.name: keywords

fields.description: Specify the canonical URL for this page. This helps prevent duplicate content issues by indicating the preferred version of a page.
fields.name: canonicalUrl
fields.title: Canonical URL

fields.description: The canonical URL of the page. This should be the full URL including protocol (https://).
fields.name: url
fields.title: Open Graph URL

fields.description: The name of your website. This is often the site title.
fields.name: siteName
fields.title: Open Graph Site Name

fields.description: Select the type of content for Open Graph.
fields.name: type
fields.title: Open Graph Type

fields.description: Choose whether to upload an image or provide an image URL for Open Graph.
fields.name: imageType

fields.description: Recommended size: 1200x630px (minimum 600x315px). Max file size: 5MB. Aspect ratio 1.91:1.
A description of the image for accessibility purposes.
fields.name: alt
fields.title: Image Alt Text

fields.name: image
fields.title: Open Graph Image

fields.description: Enter the full URL of the image. Ensure the image is accessible and meets the recommended size of 1200x630px (minimum 600x315px).
fields.name: imageUrl
fields.title: Open Graph Image URL

fields.description: The X (formerly Twitter) handle of the website (e.g., @example)

fields.description: Enable this to prevent search engines from indexing this page. The page will not appear in search results.
